title: Expand runtime-discipline audit automation for v3.1
description: Broaden runtime-discipline beyond baseline-complete negative and positive paths by adding lower-cost audit paths, stronger audit automation, and additional replayable failure families before v3.1.0.
triage_notes: Follow-up after closing TASK-030 baseline operationalization. The runtime-discipline runner now emits a low-cost audit index and audit gate in addition to the audit note, audit packet, and reconstruction map, and RD-002 now has three replayable broken-chain families. The remaining gap is tighter cost reduction and broader audit automation beyond the current generated gate artifacts before v3.1.0.
